mapper.select: SELECT l.id, l.quote_id, l.action, l.comment, l.create_time, /* 优先查关联的用户表获取最新昵称，如果关联不到(用户被删)则用日志表存的快照 */ COALESCE(u1.nickname, l.operator_name) as operator_name, COALESCE(u2.nickname, l.receiver_name) as receiver_name FROM quote_log l LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON l.operator_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON l.receiver_id = u2.id WHERE l.quote_id = #{quoteId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
